summary:
The retrieval confirms that ABC and VED analysis at PHCs is primarily applied to monitor vaccination coverage by identifying discrepancies and enabling targeted public health actions. This makes it distinct from general stock management or staffing concerns, supporting a focus on immunization outcomes.  

$\boxed{C}$
